description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the debian:bullseye Docker image. Define a deploy stage with a pages job that runs `apt-get update`, then `apt-get -qy install --no-install-recommends python3-chardet python3-feedparser python3-html5lib python3-httplib2 python-librdf python3-libxml2 python3-portalocker python3-utidylib python3-bs4 python3-lxml xsltproc`, then `test -d public || mkdir public`, `test -d cache || mkdir cache`, and finally `python3 planet.py fdroid.ini`. The job always publishes the `public/` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact that expires after 60 minutes. The pages job only runs on the master branch.
